differential_diagnoses: Snakebite envenomation with venom-induced consumptive coagulopathy (VICC)
Acute kidney injury (acute tubular necrosis and potentially cortical necrosis)
next_steps: Perform immediate fluid resuscitation and hemodynamic stabilization
Correct coagulopathy with blood products (fresh frozen plasma, cryoprecipitate, and packed red blood cells)
Perform urgent obstetric evaluation including bedside ultrasound to assess placental location and fetal status
Prepare for emergent delivery due to placental abruption and fetal/maternal compromise
Monitor renal function and consider early referral for hemodialysis if available
Remove the tourniquet after establishing venous access and preparing for potential reperfusion-related hypotension
